release.relationship_to_paper: Official post-v1 snapshot dated 20 days after immutable arXiv v1; not demonstrated paper-time code.

static_audit.task_schema_status: Open-ended instruction plus optional VM and arbitrary task_config; no released CutVerse task/milestone/artifact contract.
static_audit.environment_status: Hyper-V reset/start/health and screenshot/action infrastructure is present, but no paper environment image, snapshot manifest, application/version/license inventory, source-pack hash set, reset canary, or paper trial environment record is released.
static_audit.important_internal_boundary: PROGRESS.md states that real-VM end-to-end execution remained pending and the evaluator was a stub; README says the OSWorld-Win harness was merged on 2026-06-08.

claim_boundary: The release supports static inspection of a post-v1 Windows GUI-agent harness and VM lifecycle implementation. It does not support replay or independent audit of the 186 CutVerse tasks, 3,484 expert interactions, 631 milestones, reported baseline outcomes, human-judge agreement, parser accuracy, temporal artifact correctness, creative quality, professional acceptance, reliability, cost, or readiness.
methods: Verified the pinned ZIP integrity and inventory from local provenance.
Enumerated every archive path and extension.
Compiled all 127 Python source strings with Python compile(); no syntax errors were found.
Inspected runner, task example, VM lifecycle, agent loop, evaluator interfaces/placeholders, release roadmap, progress notes, and repository status.
Searched the complete archive for task, parser, milestone, evaluator, trajectory, result, checkpoint, screenshot, retry, and artifact surfaces.
Did not execute the Windows/Hyper-V harness on this Linux host and did not infer absent task, result, media, or judge artifacts.
